description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a two-story structure with clean, geometric lines. The front facade includes a covered carport with a pergola, a balcony above, and a landscaped yard with a palm tree and manicured shrubs. Large windows with dark frames are symmetrically arranged on both floors, providing ample natural light. The property is enclosed by a black fence, and the backyard includes a gazebo and a paved walkway. The exterior walls are finished in a beige tone with contrasting dark accents, giving the building a contemporary appearance. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor spaces and functional living areas.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with flat roofs, large windows, a carport, landscaped yard, and a black perimeter fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carport with pergola, main entrance, balcony, landscaped yard, and decorative fencing.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, window arrangement, gazebo in the backyard, and the continuation of the fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back facade, minimal windows, and the black fence enclosing the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the carport, balcony, palm tree, and the row of shrubs along the fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
